hooks.command: if [ -e .claude ] && [ ! -d .claude ]; then echo '{"_error":"Invalid .claude path"}'; exit 1; fi; if [ -L .claude ] || [ -L .claude/sessions.json ]; then echo '{"_error":"Refusing symlinked sessions.json"}'; exit 1; fi; [ -f .claude/sessions.json ] || (umask 077 && mkdir -p .claude && echo '{"_schema_version":"1.0","_hint":"Track SESSION_IDs here. Do not store secrets or tokens.","tasks":{}}' > .claude/sessions.json); cat .claude/sessions.json
